_comment_: EXAMPLE FILE — Cursor does not read this from the repo. Cursor's IDE agent terminal allowlist is per-user only and lives at ~/.cursor/permissions.json. See AGENTS.md → 'Agent terminal allowlist' for the install recipe and the rationale for what's included/excluded. This file exists so the curated set is version-controlled and PR-reviewable; widening it is a deliberate diff, not an ad-hoc per-machine drift. Re-merge into your personal file with `make cursor-perms-sync` after pulling changes here. NOTE: this file only controls terminal command auto-run. Filesystem and network sandbox rules live in .cursor/sandbox.json, which Cursor reads directly from the repo.
